content:
• Includes narrative structure (rising action, climax, resolution) within the course itself.
• Tied to RPG mechanics (story structure, hero’s journey, faction conflicts).

✔ Weekly Breakdown (Modules 1-15)
• Each week contains:
• Day/Night Settings
• Historical & Literary Focus
• Narrative & RPG Framing
• XP, Items, and Power-Ups Available
• Skill Checks & In-Class Activities
• Assignments & Student Options
• Archetype-Specific Relevance
• Boss Fights, Unlockables, and Class-Wide Challenges

✔ Assignments & Discussion Paths
• Clearly formatted to reflect the A/B Schedule Alternation
• Includes:
• Close Reading vs. Discussion Weeks (alternating)
• Pet Peeve / Catharsis Reflections
• RPG-Specific Challenges
• Performance-Based & Memorization Tasks
• Group vs. Individual Work Paths
• Weekly Creative Extra Credit Options
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 414 (chunk 414/555)
